category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Tanzanian market (TBS PVoC + Certificate of Conformity / TBS mark).

title.en: China-to-Tanzania LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入坦桑尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入坦尚尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Tanzania market-access requirements: TBS (Tanzania Bureau of Standards) mandatory conformity via the PVoC programme with a Certificate of Conformity and TBS mark, TZS standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, energy labelling, and TCRA radio type-approval for smart luminaires, compared with Chinese GB / GB-T standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与坦桑尼亚市场准入要求差距对照：TBS（坦桑尼亚标准局）经 PVoC 计划实施的强制合格评定、合格证书（CoC）及 TBS 标志，采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 TZS 标准、能效标签，以及智能灯具的 TCRA 无线电型号核准，与中国 GB / GB-T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與坦尚尼亞市場准入要求差距對照：TBS（坦尚尼亞標準局）經 PVoC 計劃實施的強制合格評定、合格證書（CoC）及 TBS 標誌，採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 的 TZS 標準、能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 TCRA 無線電型號核准，與中國 GB / GB-T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Tanzanian law, TBS / PVoC requirements, the applicable TZS / IEC standards, energy-labelling rules, and TCRA radio requirements with qualified professionals and the relevant Tanzanian authorities before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及坦桑尼亚相关主管机构核验现行坦桑尼亚法律、TBS / PVoC 要求、适用的 TZS / IEC 标准、能效标签规则及 TCRA 无线电要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及坦尚尼亞相關主管機構核驗現行坦尚尼亞法律、TBS / PVoC 要求、適用的 TZS / IEC 標準、能效標籤規則及 TCRA 無線電要求。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Tanzania must route regulated electrical products through the TBS (Tanzania Bureau of Standards) PVoC (Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity) programme, obtaining a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) per shipment and the right to bear the TBS mark; demonstrate electrical safety against TZS standards adopting IEC 60598 (luminaires) and IEC 60598-2 / IEC 62560 (self-ballasted lamps), with the 230 V / 50 Hz Tanzanian grid in mind (same 50 Hz as China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V); meet TBS / TZS EMC limits adopting CISPR 15; address photobiological safety via TZS / IEC 62471 where applied; comply with the Tanzanian energy-labelling requirement administered under the national energy-efficiency framework; and obtain TCRA (Tanzania Communications Regulatory Authority) type-approval for any luminaire with wireless functionality. Tanzania has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery / SVHC regime — those obligations do not apply, though substances may still be addressed via product-specific TZS standards. Goods clear mainly through the port of Dar es Salaam and an in-country registered importer is required. None of this is covered by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB compliance.
answer_first.zh: 向坦桑尼亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：将受管制电气产品纳入 TBS（坦桑尼亚标准局）PVoC（装运前合格验证）计划，按批次取得合格证书（CoC）并获得加贴 TBS 标志的权利；依据采用 IEC 60598（灯具）及 IEC 60598-2 / IEC 62560（自镇流灯）的 TZS 标准证明电气安全，并考虑 230 V / 50 Hz 的坦桑尼亚电网（与中国同为 50 Hz，但额定电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）；满足采用 CISPR 15 的 TBS / TZS EMC 限值；在适用时通过 TZS / IEC 62471 处理光生物安全；遵守在国家能效框架下管理的坦桑尼亚能效标签要求；并为任何具备无线功能的灯具取得 TCRA（坦桑尼亚通信管理局）型号核准。坦桑尼亚没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS / 电池 / SVHC 制度——这些义务不适用，但物质问题仍可能通过特定产品 TZS 标准处理。货物主要经达累斯萨拉姆港清关，并须有在地注册进口商。上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 合规所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 向坦尚尼亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：將受管制電氣產品納入 TBS（坦尚尼亞標準局）PVoC（裝運前合格驗證）計劃，按批次取得合格證書（CoC）並獲得加貼 TBS 標誌的權利；依據採用 IEC 60598（燈具）及 IEC 60598-2 / IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）的 TZS 標準證明電氣安全，並考慮 230 V / 50 Hz 的坦尚尼亞電網（與中國同為 50 Hz，但額定電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）；滿足採用 CISPR 15 的 TBS / TZS EMC 限值；在適用時通過 TZS / IEC 62471 處理光生物安全；遵守在國家能效框架下管理的坦尚尼亞能效標籤要求；並為任何具備無線功能的燈具取得 TCRA（坦尚尼亞通信管理局）型號核准。坦尚尼亞沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS / 電池 / SVHC 制度——這些義務不適用，但物質問題仍可能通過特定產品 TZS 標準處理。貨物主要經達累斯薩拉姆港清關，並須有在地註冊進口商。上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 合規所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify TBS PVoC scope, applicable TZS / IEC standard editions, the Tanzanian energy-labelling requirement, and TCRA radio rules on each review cycle.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Target-market facts must be verified against TBS, TCRA, and Tanzanian primary legal sources; cn_common_equivalent must be verified against current GB / GB-T standards.
